Build a FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL

Fixed-Price
$500 - $1,500
Expert
1 to 3 months

We need an experienced Python developer to build a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL. The project involves designing database schema, implementing JWT authentication, writing unit tests with pytest, and deploying to AWS Lambda. Ideal candidate has 3+ years with Python async frameworks.
